producthunt.name: Acti
producthunt.tagline: Agentic keyboard for mobile commands and search
producthunt.description: Type what you need. Hold Acti Bar. Acti understands your intent and brings back the right result, link, or action - right where you are. Use Acti for live sports schedules, nearby restaurants, Notion docs, LinkedIn profiles, Meet links, Calendar actions, and custom workflows - without leaving the conversation.

producthunt.name: Humalike
producthunt.tagline: Give your AI agents the social intelligence they're missing
producthunt.description: Today's models are capable enough. Smart enough. Fast enough. But we still feel they don’t fit in the room. Humalike is building the behavioral infrastructure for humanlike AI agents. The social skills & proactiveness your agents have been missing. APIs, models, benchmarks.

producthunt.name: Tabstack Browser Automation
producthunt.tagline: Automate the web in your app or agent, no browser to host
producthunt.description: Give /automate a task in plain English and it drives a real browser to do it: navigate a site, click through a multi-step flow, fill a form, reach a page that only renders after interaction. The result streams back in one API call. It's an API you call, not a framework you install. Browser and LLM included, nothing to host, no concurrency ceiling. Accessibility-tree automation spends 60 to 80% fewer tokens than screenshot-based agents. Built by Mozilla. Ephemeral, no training on your data.
